---
title: "General Sir Alexander George Montgomery Moore"
---

## General Sir Alexander George Montgomery Moore

**Dates:** (1833-17 January 1919)

### Description

cousin-in-law of CMY

### Biography

He was created KCB in 1900;  he married (1857) the Hon. Jane Colborne.

There is a magnificent image of him at http://www.hussards-photos.com/UK/UK_4_CDV_Moore.htm

### Letters

- Letter from April 11 [1900]
- Letter from March 27 [1900]
- [To Mary Yonge, Oct 18th [1897[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3385_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Sept 28th 1885
- Letter from February 16, 1859
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
